triples.subject: Tesla
triples.sentence: In 2023, Tesla delivered its highest total of vehicles yet, 1.8 million cars worldwide, keeping its position as the top-selling EV brand globally.

triples.subject: BYD
triples.sentence: In 2023, the company reported a total revenue of $60.4 billion and a net profit of $1.5 billion.

triples.subject: BYD
triples.sentence: BYD's EV sales exceeded 1.8 million units, marking a 70% increase from the previous year and putting the company near Tesla in worldwide battery-electric vehicle sales.

triples.subject: Ford
triples.sentence: Ford's EV sales for the first half of 2024 represented a 72% increase year over year.

triples.subject: GM
triples.sentence: GM reported retail sales of 38,355 EVs in the first half of 2024 and is projecting more growth during the rest of the year.

triples.subject: NIO
triples.sentence: In the second quarter of 2024, NIO delivered 57,373 vehicles.

triples.subject: Volkswagen
triples.sentence: By 2030, Volkswagen said it thinks at least 70% of its European sales will come from its EVs.
